description_long: This is a modern bungalow residence set within a large, rectangular plot bordered by hedges and trees. The property features two distinct single-story structures, each with flat roofs and expansive glass windows, providing a contemporary aesthetic. The main building is surrounded by a paved patio area, landscaped with shrubs and small trees, and includes a visible entryway and outdoor seating. The secondary structure, separated by a hedge, appears to be a guest house or auxiliary unit, also with large windows and a minimalist design. The grounds are predominantly covered in manicured grass, with a driveway or paved path leading to the main entrance. The overall layout emphasizes open space, privacy, and integration with the surrounding greenery.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow complex with flat roofs, large glass windows, and landscaped grounds, featuring two separate structures within a spacious, hedge-bordered plot.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the front of the main bungalow and guest house, with the entry patio, landscaping, and the expansive grassy yard in the foreground.
description_view_1: View 1 highlights the side of the property, revealing the separation between the two buildings and the hedge dividing the plot.
description_view_2: View 2 provides a rear perspective, showing the backyards, additional landscaping, and the full extent of the hedge enclosure.
description_view_3: View 3 displays the opposite side, focusing on the rear and side facades of both buildings, with the main patio and more greenery visible.
